sources.title: ElevenLabs: The $500 Million ARR AI Company Flying Under the Radar
sources.text: ElevenLabs: The $500 Million ARR AI Company Flying Under the Radar SubscribeSign in # ElevenLabs: The $500 Million ARR AI Company Flying Under the Radar ### Mornings With Markman - May 7th, 2026 May 07, 2026 2 Share ## Two Polish High School Friends Built The Fastest-Growing AI Company In Europe. Most Investors Have Never Heard Of It. In 2010, in a high school in Warsaw, two Polish teenagers named Mati Staniszewski and Piotr Dąbkowski watched American movies dubbed into Polish by a single male narrator. The narrator read every line, regardless of who was speaking. Men, women, children, all delivered in the same monotone. The performances were flattened. The emotion was destroyed. The movies were technically watchable and structurally absurd. Twelve years later, the same two men founded a company specifically to fix that problem. #### By 2026, that company crossed $500 million in annual recurring revenue. The deep dives that landed us on Substack’s Rising Finance list. Join for free. Subscribe Last week, BlackRock, Wellington, D.E. Shaw, Schroders, NVIDIA, Salesforce, Deutsche Telekom, and Santander joined existing investors Sequoia and Andreessen Horowitz in a Series D extension at

sources.title: Eleven Labs
sources.text: # Eleven Labs (GROUPE ELEVEN SAS) Eleven Labs is a Technology, Information and Internet company. Eleven Labs is an IT consulting firm that supports DSI and CTO in complex and structuring projects. Eleven Labs employs 75 people (+7.6% YoY, +7 people) and has an annual revenue of $158.2K, founded in 2011. Headquartered in Paris, Île-de-France, France, operates in 7 countries (including Côte d'Ivoire, Canada, Brazil, Israel, and Italy). ## About Créé en 2011, Eleven Labs est une agence de conseil et d’ingénierie web & IA reconnue pour son excellence technique et la qualité de ses profils. Avec 100 astronautes et plus de 500 projets menés, on accompagne au quotidien des entreprises comme Radio France, Decathlon, Sephora, The Fork, Société Générale, 20 Minutes, Citeo, Believe... Notre rôle, c’est d’apporter une expertise pointue pour cadrer, fiabiliser et accélérer les transformations numériques les plus exigeantes. On intervient dès l’amont avec des audits et du conseil stratégique pour sécuriser les décisions, puis on met en œuvre des solutions robustes et durables grâce à un delivery sur mesure. Nos expertises : 🪐 Audit & conseil technologique 🪐 Développement web et applicatif sur

sources.title: ElevenLabs
sources.text: # ElevenLabs (ElevenLabs Inc.) ElevenLabs is a Research Services company. Elevenlabs is a company that provides a free online AI text to speech (TTS) software. They offer a powerful AI voice generator that allows users to create natural AI voices in any language. The company is perfect for video creators, developers, and businesses. ElevenLabs employs 645 people (+194.0% YoY, +549 people) and has an annual revenue of $2.0M, founded in 2022. Headquartered in London, United Kingdom, operates in 57 countries (including United States, Poland, India, Germany, and Spain). Has $881.0M in total funding, with 12 prior funding rounds. ## About ElevenLabs is transforming human-technology interaction with AI research and products. ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale. ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages. ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models. These platforms are powered by our leading AI research. We developed

sources.title: Eleven Lab
sources.text: # Eleven Lab Eleven Lab is a Design Services company. Eleven Lab is a strategic design consulting firm that helps startups and companies identify, build, develop, and refocus. They offer a 100% strategic design approach and support in validating, building, developing, and refocusing businesses. They also provide services such as mentoring, research, and analysis with users to execute the solutions needed by the market. Eleven Lab employs 3 people (-25.0% YoY, -1 person), founded in 2020. Headquartered in Madrid, Spain. ## About We are an innovation laboratory and startup incubator involved in projects that look toward a better future: more livable, fairer, and less individual. We identify with projects that are committed, like us, to the mission of UN Objective 11, with those of the 2030 Agenda, with the changes that Industry 4.0 poses, or with the opportunities offered by the PropTech market. ## Company Details - Industry: Design Services - Type: Privately Held - Headquarters: Madrid, Spain - Founded Year: 2020 - Homepage: elevenlab.org - Status: active - Aliases: eleven lab, eleven lab (spain) - LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/eleven-lab - Emails: info@elevenlab.org, hola@elevenla

sources.text: Skip to content Log in Sign up Contact sales Log in ElevenLabs - Contact Sales - Learn More Learn More # ElevenLabs raises $500M Series D at $11B valuation Written by Mati Staniszewski Piotr Dabkowski Published Feb 4, 2026 ListenListen to this article 0:00 0:00 0:00 Contact Sales Learn More - ElevenLabs closed 2025 with over $330 million in ARR, driven by rapid enterprise adoption by companies like Deutsche Telekom, Square, the Ukrainian Government, and Revolut for customer support, conversational commerce, citizen engagement, internal training, and inbound sales. - This $500 million funding round values ElevenLabs at $11 billion, more than 3x its valuation one year ago. - With the new funding, ElevenLabs is doubling down on ElevenAgents, its enterprise platform for voice and conversational AI, to support customer experience, sales and marketing, and internal workflows with interactive voice agents. - ElevenLabs today announced a major upgrade to its voice agents, enabling faster response times and improved expressiveness, powered by new turn-taking improvements and its Eleven v3 Conversational model. - The funding will also help strengthen ElevenLabs’ foundation, its research, by

sources.text: ElevenLabs raises $500M from Sequoia at an $11 billion valuation | TechCrunch –:–:–:– The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. Image Credits:ElevenLabs # ElevenLabs raises $500M from Sequoia at an $11 billion valuation 7:33 AM PST · February 4, 2026 Voice AI company ElevenLabs said today it raised $500 million in a new funding round led by Sequoia Capital, which was an investor in the startup’s last secondary round through a tender. Sequoia partner Andrew Reed is joining the company’s board. The startup is now valued at $11 billion, more than three times its valuation in its last round in January 2025. Earlier in the year, the Financial Times reported that the startup was looking to raise at that valuation. The company said that existing investor a16z quadrupled its investment amount, and Iconiq, which led the last round, tripled it. Some prior investors, like BroadLight, NFDG, Valor Capital, AMP Coalition, and Smash Capital, also joined the round. New investors for the funding included Lightspeed Venture Partners, Evantic Capital, and Bond. ElevenLabs

Image Credits:ElevenLabs # ElevenLabs, the hot AI audio startup, confirms $180M in Series C funding at a $3.3B valuation 9:00 AM PST · January 30, 2025 ElevenLabs, one of the more popular startups working in the field of AI audio, said Thursday that it has raised a Series C round of $180 million, valuing the company at $3.3 billion post-money. a16z and ICONIQ Growth are co-leading the investment. Rumors of the fundraise were first reported by TechCrunch. The final numbers confirm some but not all of the details we previously reported (specifically, the overall size of the round is smaller than we had heard; the valuation and lead investors are the same). The funding will be used to continue building out ElevenLabs’ audio tools and for business development. sources.title: ElevenLabs, creator of Suno rival Eleven Music, raises $500m at $11bn valuation - Music Business Worldwide
sources.text: ElevenLabs, creator of Suno rival Eleven Music, raises $500m at $11bn valuation - Music Business Worldwide February 5, 2026 Piotr Dąbkowski and Mati Staniszewski AI audio startup ElevenLabs has raised $500 million in a Series D funding round, valuing the London and New York-headquartered company at $11 billion — more than triple its valuation from a year ago. The round was led by Sequoia Capital, with partner Andrew Reed joining the ElevenLabs board. Investors Andreessen Horowitz and ICONIQ significantly increased their stakes, while Lightspeed Venture Partners, Evantic Capital, and BOND joined as new investors. Other backers including BroadLight, NFDG, Valor Capital, AMP Coalition, and Smash Capital also participated, with additional investors expected to be disclosed later this month. The funding round arrives six months after the company launched Eleven Music – a rival to Suno and Udio – marking its expansion beyond voice synthesis into full AI music generation. It has already inked licensing agreements with prominent rightsholders, including Merl i n and a potentially precedent-setting deal with publisher Kobalt. The funding brings ElevenLabs’ total raised to $781 million acros

sources.title: Investing in ElevenLabs: The Voice Reshaping How the World Speaks to Technology - Lightspeed Venture Partners
sources.text: Investing in ElevenLabs: The Voice Reshaping How the World Speaks to Technology - Lightspeed Venture Partners 02/04/2026 AI - Share on twitter - Share on facebook - Share on linkedin - Copy link # Investing in ElevenLabs: The Voice Reshaping How the World Speaks to Technology Team ElevenLabs. Over the past few years, we’ve watched text-based AI transform entire industries. Meanwhile, the most common mode of human connection—voice—hasn’t gone through the same evolution. Even in a tech world filled with workhorse chatbots, purpose-built conversational agents, and steady improvements in underlying model capabilities, voice-based AI has been hampered by multiple limitations. The biggest of them? The limits of synthetic speech quality. Now, that’s finally changing. And ElevenLabs is among those leading the charge. They ended 2025 at $300M+ in ARR and have one of the strongest financial profiles we have seen for a business of this scale. We’re thrilled to announce our investment in ElevenLabs’ Series D. ### Voice AI is a Mega-Trend Humans spend a third of their waking hours in some form of speech communication—far more time than we spend reading and writing combined. Being able to transf

sources.title: ElevenLabs adds high-profile investors after annualized revenue tops $500M - SiliconANGLE
sources.text: ElevenLabs adds high-profile investors after annualized revenue tops $500M - SiliconANGLE SHARE UPDATED 21:05 EDT / MAY 05 2026 AI ### ElevenLabs adds high-profile investors after annualized revenue tops $500M SHARE ElevenLabs Inc., a developer of artificial intelligence models optimized for audio processing, today announced that several dozen investors have joined its latest funding round. The startup first closed the Series D investment in February with a $500 million haul. The raise valued it at $11 billion. ElevenLabs didn’t specify the dollar value of its Series D extension. However, the company did disclose that the deal included the participation of Nvidia Corp.’s NVentures startup fund along with Blackrock, Wellington Management and other large financial institutions. They were joined by more than 30 entertainment industry figures, including Jamie Foxx and Eva Longoria. The company closed a $100 million tender offer in conjunction with the funding round. The transaction, which enabled existing investors to sell some of their shares, is the second of its kind that the company has completed in the past year. ElevenLabs launched its flagship Eleven v3 model in February. It can

sources.title: ElevenLabs Raises $500M as Enterprise Voice AI Adoption Accelerates - TECHnicalBeep
sources.text: ElevenLabs Raises $500M as Enterprise Voice AI Adoption Accelerates - TECHnicalBeep # ElevenLabs Raises $500M as Enterprise Voice AI Adoption Accelerates - February 5, 2026 ElevenLabs raises $500M in a Series D round at an $11 billion valuation – more than tripling its worth from a year ago. The AI voice company ended 2025 with over $330 million in annual recurring revenue, driven almost entirely by enterprise customers deploying voice agents for customer support, sales, and internal operations. This isn’t another AI company raising money on potential. ElevenLabs is already powering voice infrastructure for Meta, Epic Games, Salesforce, and over a billion end users through its API. ## Why This Round Matters Right Now: The ElevenLabs funding round signals a shift in how enterprises think about voice AI – moving from experimental projects to production-grade deployments. Companies like Deutsche Telekom, Square, Revolut, and the Ukrainian Government are using ElevenAgents (ElevenLabs’ enterprise platform) for customer-facing operations, not just internal testing. The timing coincides with major platform upgrades. ElevenLabs announced faster response times and improved expressiveness t

sources.title: ElevenLabs triples valuation to $11B in one year after $500M round led by Sequoia, eyes IPO - Tech Startups
sources.text: ElevenLabs triples valuation to $11B in one year after $500M round led by Sequoia, eyes IPO - Tech Startups - Trust & Safety - Editorial Policy May 27, 2026 - Trust & Safety - Editorial Policy - Top Startups - Startup List - Submit Your Startup - Free Startup Valuation Calculator # ElevenLabs triples valuation to $11B in one year after $500M round led by Sequoia, eyes IPO Daniel Levi Posted On February 4, 2026 4.7K Views --- 0 Shares ElevenLabs just closed a $500 million funding round that values the company at $11 billion, a sharp jump from the$3.3 billion price valuation a year ago. The raise lands as the three-year-old startup lines up a path toward a public offering. The round was led by Sequoia Capital, with participation from existing backers Andreessen Horowitz and Iconiq, as well as new investors Lightspeed Venture Partners, Evantic Capital, and Bond. Cofounder and CEO Mati Staniszewski said Nvidia took a stake in September, adding another major name to the cap table. “With the new funding, ElevenLabs is doubling down on ElevenAgents, its enterprise platform for voice and conversational AI, to support customer experience, sales and marketing, and internal workflows with int

sources.title: ElevenLabs: $500 Million Series D At $11 Billion Valuation Raised For Voice AI Platform
sources.text: ElevenLabs: $500 Million Series D At $11 Billion Valuation Raised For Voice AI Platform # ElevenLabs: $500 Million Series D At $11 Billion Valuation Raised For Voice AI Platform By Amit Chowdhry • Feb 6, 2026 ElevenLabs: $500 Million Series D At $11 Billion Valuation Raised For Voice AI Platform ElevenLabs announced that it has raised $500 million in a Series D financing round that values the voice and conversational AI company at $11 billion, more than tripling its valuation from a year earlier. The company said the round brings its total funding to $781 million across five rounds since its founding in 2022. The Series D was led by Sequoia Capital, with Sequoia partner Andrew Reed joining ElevenLabs’ board. Andreessen Horowitz “quadrupled down” and ICONIQ “tripled down,” both with what the company described as significant super pro rata participation. New investors joining the round include Lightspeed Venture Partners, Evantic Capital, and BOND, according to ElevenLabs. The company also said existing investors BroadLight, NFDG, Valor Capital, AMP Coalition, and Smash Capital continued their support, with additional investor participation expected to be disclosed later in February.

sources.title: ElevenLabs CEO says AI audio models will be 'commoditized' over time | TechCrunch
sources.text: ElevenLabs CEO says AI audio models will be 'commoditized' over time | TechCrunch –:–:–:– The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. Image Credits:Jeff Spicer/Getty Images for SXSW London # ElevenLabs CEO says AI audio models will be ‘commoditized’ over time 9:59 AM PDT · October 29, 2025 AI audio company ElevenLabs‘ co-founder and chief executive Mati Staniszewski believes that AI models will be commoditized over time, a revealing comment for a company focused today on building them. Speaking onstage at the TechCrunch Disrupt 2025 conference on Tuesday, the ElevenLabs founder was discussing both his short-term and long-term views of the AI audio space. Staniszewski said that his company’s researchers have been able to crack some of the model architecture challenges, and this focus will continue in the audio space for the next year or two. “Over the long term, it will commoditize — over the next couple of years,” Staniszewski said. “Even if there’s differences — which I think will be the truth for some voices, some languages — on its own, the differen
